title: Extracting Relevant Information from JSON
scenario: Extract relevant information from a sample JSON data set containing user and order data. Output should include names of all users with at least 5 orders and total revenue generated by these users. The output should be formatted as a list with JSON keys as headers and should be limited to 150 words.
constraints: Must include user names with at least 5 orders
Total revenue must be correctly calculated

evaluationCriteria.description: Judge checks if the output adheres to the specified constraints.
Judge checks if the output contains valid JSON syntax.
Judge checks if the extracted data is accurate and based on the provided JSON data.
